html:
Parallel motion: red image-plane arrows are scaled by depth.
⚠ Figure failed to load

interactions.label: Motion Direction
interactions.teaches: Switching between motion parallel to the camera plane and parallel to the optical axis demonstrates how motion affects image plane velocities differently.

interactions.label: Velocity
interactions.teaches: Adjusting the velocity shows the relationship between the speed of 3D movement and the velocity of projections on the image plane.

demo_steps.title: Motion Parallel to Image Plane
demo_steps.narration: Here, the point moves parallel to the image plane. Notice how its projection shows horizontal movement on the image plane, reflecting its motion parallel to the camera.

demo_steps.title: Motion Along Optical Axis
demo_steps.narration: Now, the point moves directly towards the camera. Its projection reduces in size, showing the effect of moving along the optical axis.

demo_steps.title: Comparison of Motion Effects
demo_steps.narration: Switch between the two motions to compare. Observe how parallel motion affects orientation and optical axis motion affects size on the image plane.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Positioned to view both the camera origin and the image plane clearly, with a slight angle to show depth.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure arrows indicating motion are clearly visible and their lengths are proportional to velocity.

attempts.html:
Parallel motion: projected arrows are also parallel.
⚠ Figure failed to load

discrepancies: No red arrows representing motion direction
Different sphere colors: original has green and cyan, rendered uses light green
Labels placement differs, e.g., 'Image plane' is misaligned
Dashed lines are not correctly positioned
Rendered image has less text clarity
evaluation.notes: The rendered figure includes necessary elements, but struggles with color fidelity, label placement, and depth accuracy.
action_items: Recolor the spheres to differentiate them clearly as in the source image using green and cyan.
Add red arrows to indicate motion direction and adjust the positioning of labels for clarity.
Ensure dashed lines accurately match the source image in terms of starting and ending points.

feedback.rationale: The concept is correct, but the execution needs improvements in colors, labels, and positioning.

Ensure dashed lines accurately match the source image in terms of starting and ending points.

Parallel motion: image arrows are parallel and scaled by depth.

discrepancies: Different label styles and sizes
Generated figure lacks exact positional alignment
Missing dashed lines in some rays
Arrow colors and sizes do not perfectly match
Background squares not present in original
evaluation.notes: The generated figure captures the overall structure but has issues with color, label presence, and interaction functionality.
action_items: Correct colors to match the original figure's arrow and ray colors.
Ensure all labels from the original are present and clearly visible.
Fix interaction issues to ensure that buttons and sliders have the intended effects.

feedback.rationale: The issues identified are related to label style, alignment, colors, and interaction functionality, indicating execution problems with the current generation rather than conceptual or planning issues.
action_items: Correct colors to match the original figure's arrow and ray colors.

Fix interaction issues to ensure that buttons and sliders have the intended effects.

discrepancies: Different number of arrows and line styles, especially the solid and dashed lines
Label placement and sizes differ noticeably from the original
Text colors and background colors do not fully match the source image
The original has some labels missing in the 3D generation
Arrows are different in size and shape compared to the original
evaluation.notes: The 3D version captures the general layout but diverges significantly in labels and colors.
action_items: Ensure all key labels from the original are present and correctly positioned.
Match the arrow styles, colors, and sizes more closely to the original.
Correct color mismatches, especially for lines and labels.

feedback.rationale: The issues primarily concern label placement, color mismatches, and arrow styling, which are execution details rather than conceptual errors.
